description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden ladder with two parallel side rails and ten evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The wood appears weathered, giving it a rustic, utilitarian look suitable for outdoor or garage use. The rungs are rectangular and flush with the rails, with no visible anti-slip features or reinforcements. The ladder is straight and does not have any hinges, folding mechanisms, or stabilizer bars, indicating it is designed to be leaned against a surface. The side rails are round in profile, consistent with traditional wooden ladders. There are no visible metal parts or additional safety features, making it a basic, functional tool for reaching elevated areas.
description: A tall, rustic wooden ladder with ten evenly spaced rungs and round side rails, designed for leaning use. The wood is weathered and lacks visible safety features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all ten rungs and both side rails clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the ladder's thin profile and the depth of the rungs.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the rungs and rails from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the ladder's narrowness and rung depth.
